changelog: 🎓 Identity & Intelligence Update: Added 5 CC, 4 TC, and 9 Marksheet custom templates with live preview before printing. New Template Picker Modal and per-school template preference saving. Fixed 4 silent dashboard chart failures (Fee by Category, Expense by Category, Grade Avg Score, Subject Avg Score) — all now populate correctly from existing data. Added branded desktop splash screen with Lottie animation, CRT-style flicker, and smart parallel DB check. New database tables for template settings and document audit log with full Supabase sync support.
